title: SUMMER PROGRAM - 211info
text: CROOK COUNTY KIDS CLUB SUMMER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a summer program with arts and crafts, games, sports, swimming, gardening, and bike days. 1875 Ne Iron Horse Drive Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Grades 1-5 Hours: Monday-Friday 7:15am-5:30pm Email (541) 447-7661 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 610-2733 Main Phone Steins Pillar Elementary (541) 749-7102 Main Phone Crooked River Elementary (541) 447-7661 Main Phone Director, Barnes Elementary and Billing Main Phone (541) 447-7661 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook County School District Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - AFTER SCHOOL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
